source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for English data operations UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, status tables, and high-density numeric dashboards.
layout: Large-scale 8px data grids, throat-groove dividers, mottled whale-skin texture, calm cards, deep ocean shadows, and restrained high-volume dashboard density.

prompts.label: Transparent blue whale motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Blue Whale transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a blue whale mammal motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A majestic blue whale in calm side profile with accurate long streamlined anatomy, broad flat rostrum, tiny dorsal fin, pleated throat grooves, mottled blue-grey and silver skin, subtle deep-ocean shadow gradients, pale underside, no water spray, no environment. It should feel massive, quiet, and data-system ready while remaining a natural whale cutout.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full whale from nose to flukes without cropping. Clean studio lighting, crisp subject edges, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no shark, no dolphin, no humpback whale, no ocean landscape, no water surface, no bubbles, no props, no text, no watermark, no second subject.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Blue Whale light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Blue Whale", derived from the visible blue whale cutout reference. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible large scale data system.
Canvas: exact 16:9 high-resolution board, target 3840x2160, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, structured panels, and avoid dense tiny text. The board must remain legible in a catalog preview.
Required visible sections: Morphous Blue Whale, Blue Whale, Palette, Typography, English UI, Japanese UI, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Data Charts, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from blue whale skin: blue-grey body, silver mottling, pale throat grooves, deep ocean shadows, abyss navy, misty waterline neutrals, and quiet scale. The board must read as blue whale skin and large-scale data system, not generic blue SaaS.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, dense data table rows, command palette, left navigation, data-system dashboard metric cards, time-series charts, distribution bars, queue table, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, pale silver-ocean background, blue-grey primary actions, abyss navy text, whale-skin mottled texture, throat-groove divider lines, large-scale calm dashboard density, restrained shadows.
Constraints: no dolphin or shark imagery, no ocean tourist poster, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no one-note all-blue palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Blue Whale", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Blue Whale dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Blue Whale". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible blue whale cutout.
Canvas: exact 16:9 high-resolution board, target 3840x2160, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, structured panels, and avoid dense tiny text. The board must remain legible in a catalog preview.
Required visible sections: Morphous Blue Whale, Blue Whale, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, English UI, Japanese UI, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Data Charts, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Preserve the blue whale system language: abyss navy backgrounds, silver-foam text, blue-grey controls, mist and ice surfaces, deep-ocean shadows, cyan current focus states, subtle whale-skin mottling, throat-groove divider rhythm, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as blue whale skin and large-scale data system, not generic blue dashboard.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, dense data table rows, command palette, left navigation, data-system dashboard metric cards, time-series charts, distribution bars, queue table, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: abyss navy and ocean-shadow surfaces, silver-foam foreground, whale-blue active controls, current-cyan status, mist cards, blue-grey borders, mottled skin overlays, calm high-density data dashboard, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no dolphin or shark imagery, no ocean tourist poster, no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no one-note all-blue palette, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Blue Whale".
